name: EternaMine
short_description: Mine, fight monsters, upgrade your gear, obtain rare items, unlock new powers and mine some more in the massive follow-up to the popular title "Haste-Miner 2". Eternamine offers a casual yet engaging gameplay experience, expand your mining empire and discover the secrets that lie beneath the earth.
detailed_description:
Eternamine is a game focused around mining, mining will earn you various different currencies which can be used to upgrade your gear and unlock various things.

Explore a variety of unique mines and uncover countless different ores. Each mine type offers new challenges and rewards:

  • Standard mine - A classic, beginner friendly mine that periodically refills as you dig. Great for new miners to start building their fortune.

  • Deep mines - Mysterious mines that seem to stretch infinitely downward. The deeper you go, the better the ores, some say hidden treasures await those who are brave enough to reach the bottom...

  • Dark mines - Magical mines that only open during special events. These mines are fiercely contested by dangerous monsters, offering incredible rewards, but also deadly enemies. Come prepared with strong gear and sharp skills.

  • Contest mine - Every month, a brand-new Contest Mine opens, offering players a fresh challenge. The Contest Mine uses a separate currency and unique upgrades that reset at the end of each month, keeping competition fierce. (See below for more info)

  • Eternal mine - Unlockable through Ancient Shards earned by rebirthing, the Eternal Mine automatically extracts ores, tokens, and items for you, even while you're offline! Invest Ancient Shards to upgrade your Eternal Mine and maximize your idle gains.

The dungeons are areas where you can gain massive wealth if you're brave enough. With a dungeon key, you can enter a dungeon and take on the enemies that reside there, each defeated enemy will give you some rewards and after you have defeated a certain amount, the boss of that dungeon may spawn. 

Make sure you're ready to take on a dungeon before entering it, as a key for that dungeon will be consumed every time you enter, no matter if you come out victorious or perish...

Bring your sword, upgrade it and master combat abilities like Blink, Dash, and Shockwave to defeat waves of enemies and claim rich rewards.

Every month, a brand-new Contest Mine opens, offering players a fresh challenge. The Contest Mine uses a separate currency and unique upgrades that reset at the end of each month, keeping competition fierce.

Climb the online leaderboards by earning the most points during the event. At the end of the month, top performers earn powerful rewards that carry over to the main game, helping you progress faster than ever before. Each month's Contest Mine has its own unique ores, upgrades, and surprises!

Key features

  • Major gameplay loop with Leveling, Prestiging, and Rebirthing

  • Five unique mine types, including idle and offline mining

  • Five gamemodes and three difficulty levels

  • 35+ powerful upgrades

  • A massive skill tree with 160+ skills

  • 90+ items to collect, craft, and use

  • 11 unlockable pets

  • Tons of skins, shaders, particles, and lobby decorations to unlock

  • Complete the Creaturepedia and Blockopedia

  • Quests and dungeon challenges

  • Online leaderboards and monthly contests

  • Hours and hours of content to discover
